page1.title: About Me
page1.content: . Adithya Balaji . I’m a currently a software engineer / data scientist. I am currently at Carnegie Mellon University working on a in Computer Science Masters Degree. In undergrad, I double majored in Electrical Engineering and Computer Engineering at NC State University. . I’m currently working for Synthego as a Software Engineering Intern through the 8vc fellowship. I’ve previously worked for Georgian Partners as a Data Science Intern, for the Oklahoma City Thunder as a Data Science Intern, for the NC State CS Department as a Research Assistant, for Precision Lender as a Software Engineering Intern. .
